site.heroBio:
I partner with startups and businesses to build high-performance, scalable web and mobile applications. From idea to deployment, I take full ownership of the development lifecycle—delivering products that are fast, reliable, and built for growth.

With 4+ years of experience in full-stack development and DevOps, I create solutions that drive measurable business results.

about.body: I'm a Software Engineer at Vistaar Digital, Mumbai, with nearly 4 years of experience shipping full-stack web products. My work spans Laravel CMS platforms with REST APIs, custom WordPress and WooCommerce solutions, React frontends, and AWS-backed integrations — often within the same sprint cycle. I take ownership of the entire delivery arc: gathering requirements, architecting the data layer, building the interface, and keeping clients informed at every step. Outside of code, I manage key client accounts, mentor junior developers, and have led hiring for frontend roles. I do my best work in Agile environments where clarity, accountability, and quality are the standard.

contact.intro: Have a Laravel build, WordPress project, or a freelance inquiry in mind? Send a short message with your stack and timeline — I'll get back to you within a couple of business days.

footer.blurb: Full-stack web engineer with nearly 4 years delivering Laravel APIs, WordPress platforms, and React frontends for agencies, startups, and public-sector teams.

testimonials.text: Manish took full ownership of our Laravel API layer and kept the React team consistently unblocked. Releases were on schedule and communication was always clear.
testimonials.name: Priya N.

testimonials.text: Our WooCommerce booking logic had some genuinely tricky edge cases. Manish worked through UAT methodically and turned fixes around quickly — no fuss.
testimonials.name: Rahul S.

testimonials.text: Delivered solid WordPress work under a tight government deadline. The chart pipelines were documented clearly enough that the team could take over without any handholding.
testimonials.name: Anita K.

testimonials.text: We brought Manish in on a short contract sprint and he slotted straight into our stand-ups. The CMS work was delivered cleanly and without any last-minute surprises.
testimonials.name: Vikram P.

testimonials.text: Straight-talking estimates and the confidence to push back when a shortcut would have caused problems down the line. That kind of professional maturity is rare.
testimonials.name: Sneha M.

faqs.q: Are you available for freelance or contract work?
faqs.a: Yes, selectively. I'm open to well-scoped engagements — WordPress or Laravel builds, API integration work, rescue projects, or defined milestone-based contracts. Drop a note in the contact form with your stack, timeline, and budget range and we can assess fit quickly.

faqs.q: What does your day-to-day work cover?
faqs.a: Primarily: custom Laravel and WordPress development, WooCommerce builds including complex booking and payment flows, REST API design, React frontend integration, and AWS Lambda/S3 setups. I also handle performance optimisation, SEO implementation, and third-party tool integrations such as NotifyVisitor. On the delivery side, I manage client accounts and run Agile ceremonies for the teams I work with.

faqs.q: How do you manage projects and keep clients in the loop?
faqs.a: I work in short Agile cycles with written acceptance criteria and incremental demos. For freelance or contract work I provide a lightweight statement of work upfront, weekly progress checkpoints, and a clear change-request process — so there are no surprises on timeline or scope.

faqs.q: Can you tell me more about Enablrsales.com?
faqs.a: Enablrsales.com is a sales-enablement platform built around cloud-based eDetailing for field sales teams. I delivered frontend and backend features in PHP, HTML, and CSS on a fortnightly sprint cadence, working in close collaboration with client stakeholders to refine requirements and ensure reliability for end users.

faqs.q: What made the government energy portal technically challenging?
faqs.a: The core challenge was keeping dynamic chart data — driven by nested JSON pipelines — accurate and consistent for public viewers while still giving the editorial team a safe, flexible publishing workflow in WordPress. We solved it with a layered validation process and a targeted caching strategy that separated the publishing flow from the public-facing data reads.

faqs.q: What is your experience with AWS?
faqs.a: I've integrated AWS Lambda for serverless processing tasks and S3 for scalable file storage and asset delivery within Laravel-based applications. Both have been used in production contexts where performance under load and cost-efficient scaling were priorities.

faqs.q: Have you taken on leadership or mentoring responsibilities?
faqs.a: Yes. As a Software Engineer at Vistaar Digital I conduct interviews for frontend developer roles and lead the onboarding and mentoring of new hires. I also collaborate across cross-functional teams and have managed key client accounts directly — balancing technical delivery with stakeholder communication.
